tests.details: 992 passed on 2026-05-18 for the 0.4.2 root version bump

docs.details: docs/ has been unified into a single markdown tree; MkDocs static-site responsibility removed from this repo

lint.details: uv run ruff check . passed on 2026-05-18 for the 0.4.2 root version bump; historical manual/debug/verify/analyze scripts are explicitly excluded from the default lint gate

root_build.details: crawler4j root package version is now 0.4.23; latest recorded root build artifact remains crawler4j 0.4.3 from 2026-05-26 until the 0.4.23 package build is refreshed

sdk_build.details: crawler4j-sdk 0.4.2 wheel/sdist generated and uploaded to PyPI on 2026-06-15

contracts_build.details: crawler4j-contracts 0.4.2 wheel/sdist generated and uploaded to PyPI on 2026-06-15; 0.4.0 re-upload was blocked by PyPI filename reuse policy

root_script_entry.command: uv sync --all-packages && uv run python -m src.ui.app
root_script_entry.details: Workspace root no longer exposes a published start script; developers launch the app through the installed src.ui.app module

ui_smoke.details: Smoke passed on 2026-05-01; Shell navigation/content stack and Dashboard async refresh verified

pyinstaller_bundle.details: macOS PyInstaller app, Crawler4j-0.4.16.dmg, and appcast.xml regenerated on 2026-06-19 after deleting the old remote 0.4.16 DMG; uploaded through the configured Sparkle update target, public DMG HEAD returned 200, SHA256 8463f4982ea4948a2151a7061449fc8a3fd9152848b37197a35504efb1f04243

external_packaged_module_smoke.command: Package external ctrip zip and install it through ModuleRegistry in an isolated app-data dir
external_packaged_module_smoke.details: Packaged external module install now loads from the installed app-data path and removes conflicting dev links

ctrip_labor_packaged_smoke.command: Install ctrip packaged module and run labor_workflow in isolated app-data dir
ctrip_labor_packaged_smoke.details: legacy automation compatibility imports are restored; packaged labor_workflow no longer degrades because src.automation is missing

mms_settings_store_tests.details: 4 passed on 2026-03-26 covering module/workflow settings export, removed legacy KV ignore semantics, persisted module status, and uninstall cleanup policy

mms_object_cleanup_stop_cancel_tests.details: 8 passed on 2026-06-13 covering 0.4.10 version service, task-monitor stop cleanup cancellation continuation, existing cleanup failure continuation, env release after module cancellation cleanup, and dispatcher stop propagation

mms_custom_ui_tests.details: 49 passed on 2026-06-13 covering 0.4.11 version service plus Hosted UI DataTable custom row action dispatch, module detail page, and module UI runtime regressions

atm_hosted_ui_release_tests.details: 67 passed on 2026-06-13 covering 0.4.12 version service, Hosted UI row action explicit params dispatch, task pause bound run_status release, and object cleanup regressions

rem_env_bound_ip_display_tests.details: 27 passed on 2026-06-15 covering REM environment list bound IP display, proxy tooltip metadata, password redaction, and root 0.4.13 version service

rem_source_proxy_sync_tests.details: 54 passed on 2026-06-18 covering imported fingerprint-browser source proxy parsing, host-port-only source proxy to IP table unique binding, VirtualBrowser local-forward URL repair, unmatched source proxy skip/clear behavior, environment list bound IP display limited to ip_entry_id bindings, and root 0.4.16 version service

root_0_4_17_atm_rem_tests.details: 115 passed on 2026-06-20 covering root 0.4.17 version service, task-monitor disabled job state, debug disabled-job guard, REM fixed-job cleanup safety, and environment-list skip reasons; target ruff, uv lock --check, .factory/project.json JSON validation, and git diff --check passed

root_0_4_18_virtualbrowser_fingerprint_t.details: 56 passed on 2026-06-22 covering root 0.4.18 version service, VirtualBrowser random fingerprint payload stripping, random chrome_version 139..145, addBrowser payload, and run profile UI serialization; target ruff, uv lock --check, .factory/project.json JSON validation, and git diff --check passed

root_0_4_19_drag_trace_release_tests.details: 3 passed on 2026-06-28 covering root 0.4.19 version service; target ruff, uv lock --check, .factory/project.json JSON validation, and git diff --check passed

root_0_4_20_drag_motion_release_tests.details: 24 passed on 2026-06-28 covering root 0.4.20 version service and browser.drag natural motion self-checks; target ruff, uv lock --check, .factory/project.json JSON validation, and git diff --check passed

root_0_4_21_virtualbrowser_risk_release_.details: 85 passed on 2026-06-29 covering root 0.4.21 version service, VirtualBrowser fingerprint defaults, fingerprint validation metadata, environment list risk display, scheduling skip behavior, and run profile UI serialization; target ruff, uv lock --check, .factory/project.json JSON validation, and git diff --check passed

root_0_4_22_virtualbrowser_language_rele.details: 44 passed on 2026-06-29 covering root 0.4.22 version service and VirtualBrowser language de-duplication in creation defaults and run profile UI presets; target ruff, uv lock --check, .factory/project.json JSON validation, and git diff --check passed

root_0_4_23_release_tests.details: 3 passed on 2026-06-30 covering root 0.4.23 version service; uv lock --check, .factory/project.json JSON validation, git diff --check, and ruff check passed

known_risks: ctrip real-site E2E is still open for both DevLink and ZIP installation paths, so release gate remains No-Go.
Windows PyInstaller onedir + Velopack pipeline is now in repo, but the latest batch still lacks real Windows signing, install, and self-update records.
The formal delivery batch still needs refreshed evidence binding after the Windows release pipeline landed.
0.4.23 client package evidence remains open before cross-platform client rollout; latest recorded macOS package evidence remains 0.4.16 from 2026-06-19.

technical_profile.title: Crawler4j Model 项目画像
technical_profile.stack: python + crawler4j-sdk CLI + crawler4j-contracts + core-native-v2 module project
technical_profile.summary: 适用于使用 crawler4j SDK CLI 创建和维护 0.4.x 标准 model/模块项目，强调 `module.yaml(runtime_api=core-native-v2)`、`crawler4j-contracts` 装饰器契约、CLI 脚手架、manifest lock、DevLink/ATM 调试和 zip 安装验收。
projects: Crawler4j Core 模块开发与验证
rules: 创建或补齐模块骨架时优先使用 `crawler4j module init`、`crawler4j interface create`、`crawler4j component create`、`crawler4j workflow create`、`crawler4j page-action create`、`crawler4j page create`、`crawler4j data table/query create`，不要先手写脚手架。
模块运行契约以 `module.yaml` 和模块根 `__init__.py` 为准，不把 wheel 元数据当成 Core 加载依据。
新增运行时依赖时，同时确认宿主 `crawler4j` 环境可用；不要只改模块项目 `pyproject.toml`。
调试与验收优先走 DevLink / ATM 调试与 zip 安装 smoke，避免依赖旧版临时调试脚本。
改动 SDK CLI、模板、模块契约或 Core 集成行为时，同时更新模块开发文档与回归测试。
commands: 优先执行 `uvx --from crawler4j-sdk crawler4j module init <module_name> --repo owner/<module_name>` 创建 0.4.x 模块项目，默认使用 PyPI 最新发布版本；脚本化场景按需加 `--no-git --no-install`。

进入模块项目后优先执行 `uv run crawler4j interface create <name>`、`uv run crawler4j component create <name> --implements <interface>`、`uv run crawler4j workflow create <workflow_name>`、`uv run crawler4j page-action create <action_name>`、`uv run crawler4j data table/query create ...`、`uv run crawler4j manifest lock`。
在 crawler4j Core 源码仓验证本地 CLI 时，优先执行 `uv run python -m crawler4j_sdk.cli.commands --help`。
technical_profile.note: 移除固定版本并清理旧预设命令

stack: python + crawler4j-sdk CLI + crawler4j-contracts + core-native-v2 module project

technical_profile_history.title: Crawler4j Model 项目画像

technical_profile_history.summary: 适用于使用 crawler4j SDK CLI 创建和维护标准 model/模块项目，强调 `module.yaml` 契约、CLI 脚手架、DevLink/ATM 调试和 zip 安装验收。
projects: Crawler4j Core 模块开发与验证
rules: 创建或补齐模块骨架时优先使用 `crawler4j module init`、`crawler4j task create`、`crawler4j workflow create`、`crawler4j page create`，不要先手写脚手架。
模块运行契约以 `module.yaml` 和模块根 `__init__.py` 为准，不把 wheel 元数据当成 Core 加载依据。
新增运行时依赖时，同时确认宿主 `crawler4j` 环境可用；不要只改模块项目 `pyproject.toml`。
调试与验收优先走 DevLink / ATM 调试与 zip 安装 smoke，避免依赖旧版临时调试脚本。
改动 SDK CLI、模板、模块契约或 Core 集成行为时，同时更新模块开发文档与回归测试。
commands: 优先执行 `uvx --from crawler4j-sdk crawler4j module init <module_name> --repo <owner/repo>` 创建模块项目；脚本化场景可再加 `--defaults --no-git --no-install`。
进入模块项目后优先执行 `uv run crawler4j task create <task_name>`、`uv run crawler4j workflow create <workflow_name>`、`uv run crawler4j page create <page_name>`。
在 crawler4j Core 源码仓验证本地 CLI 时，优先执行 `uv run python -m crawler4j_sdk.cli.commands --help`。
technical_profile_history.note: 启用 crawler4j model 专用 skill
